notableEvents.label: Bryce Eldridge pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Sal Frelick. Luis Arraez scores.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio. Bryce Eldridge scores. Daniel Susac to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert flies out to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Giants challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Christian Yelich steals (4) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo picked off and caught stealing 2nd base. Luis Rengifo to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Trevor McDonald.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jackson Chourio out at 2nd. Brice Turang out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Daniel Susac on the pickoff attempt.
